program.epg-synopsis: Josh Flagg accuses Josh Altman of client poaching when he learns that Altman is working with his former drama camp counselor.
The Sharks give budding entrepreneurs the chance to secure business deals that could make them millionaires.

program.epg-title: The Real Housewives Of Beverly Hills
program.epg-synopsis: After throwing a bridal shower for Camille, Kyle finds that she is being blamed for Lisa Vanderpump's absence. A dinner celebrating Lisa Rinna's mother takes an unexpected turn.

A mother of two has no choice but to duct tape up her boobs, and a D-list celebrity wants to get an A-List nose.
The family of a former soldier questions whether or not his death was a tragic coincidence when they learn of a suspicious detail from his wife's past.

A breach of contract brings these young entrepreneurs to court as the plaintiffs contend that the defendant failed to pay a personal loan used to boost the plaintiff's musical career.
Case One: An alleged infestation of roaches has the plaintiff suing her landlord for the return of $1,800 in rent money. But the defendant is countersuing for $5,000 for damages to the apartment.

The Altman brothers are thrilled to get a spectacular listing in Brentwood but the seller insists on having a security guard on the premises.

Fredrik lists an infamous Chelsea townhouse with an eccentric seller whose reputation for firing brokers precedes her.

A man sues his ex-wife for a propane gas bill and rent. The defendant says paying the bills was the least he could do since she takes care of children from a previous marriage and let him sleep on her
Steve's world is turned upside down when his brokerage shutters without warning, leaving the Gold Group without a home.
Treats utilizing recycled vegetable waste; a lighting product to help one look their best online; a hydrating beverage filled with antioxidants and made from a common desert plant.
Drag artist Gypsy wants to look less Coco the Clown and more Coco Chanel. Engaged couple Jonathan and Gemma are worried that an excessive sweating problem will ruin their big day.
The Klumps are back in this hilarious sequel! Having done his best to keep Buddy buried in his subconscious, the portly professor Klump (Eddie Murphy) is horrified to find him resurfacing in untimely

The Sharks give budding entrepreneurs the chance to secure business deals that could make them millionaires.
Case One: The plaintiff is suing her tenant for $4,000 for unpaid rent, property damage and unpaid utilities. But the defendant contends that he never saw a lease and didn't damage the apartment.

Cosmetics to help clear up imperfections; a water sports apparel brand; a product designed to keep dogs hydrated during any excursion; a solution to drinking a beverage while fishing.
Dr Dubrow keeps performs full body work, on a pair of co-dependent sisters.
Wihan's attention shifts to a new flame while Lara gets frustrated with his carefree attitude. An overlooked hazard causes Johnny and a charter guest to flip a jet ski in dangerously shallow waters.

program.epg-title: The Real Housewives Of Beverly Hills
program.epg-synopsis: The ladies hit the road in Teddi's RV for a camping trip in the great outdoors. With no room for glam squads, Erika and Dorit embrace the idea of roughing it.

program.epg-title: The Real Housewives Of Beverly Hills

program.episode-title: I Like Big Butts and I Did Not Die!
program.epg-synopsis: The doctors take on a patient who nearly died after a mommy makeover gone wrong & a man plagued by his flat nose needs it fixed so he can propose.
A young man is brutally murdered and a woman is found covered in blood just hours later. She is adamant that she is innocent, and later a twist in the case shocks everyone involved.
Andy Cohen interviews the cast of Below Deck Mediterranean.
Unfinished car repairs bring these litigants to court and instead of repairing the plaintiff's car, she says her vehicle was vandalized while on the defendant's property.

program.episode-title: The Life And Death Of Princess Diana
program.epg-synopsis: Insights into the real story of the very private royal, including a look at Diana's troubled marriage, her turbulent life in the royal family and the investigation into her death.

program.epg-synopsis: In Provence, a countryside excursion features a lot of wine, and even more laughs, despite Erika's unenthusiastic attitude. Teddi and Kyle overindulge, leading to a shocking night of revelations.
